name: list
description: List utilities mirroring Python's list methods

new.description: Create a new list from arguments

push.description: Append an item to the end, return new list

pop.description: Remove and return the last item (or item at index)

get.description: Get item at index (negative index supported)

set.description: Return a new list with item at index replaced

del.description: Return a new list with item at index removed

len.description: Return the number of items in the list

sort.description: Return a sorted copy of the list

key.description: Attribute/key to sort by (for list of dicts)

reverse.description: Return a reversed copy of the list

contains.description: Return true if item is in the list

index.description: Return index of first occurrence, or -1

count.description: Count occurrences of item in list

insert.description: Return new list with item inserted at index

flatten.description: Flatten one level of nested lists

join.description: Join list items into a string

zip.description: Zip two lists into a list of [a, b] pairs

avg.description: Return the average of numeric items

filter.description: Keep items matching a regex pattern (strings only)

map_str.description: Apply a str: operation to every item (e.g. upper, lower, strip)

range.description: Generate a list of numbers from start to end (inclusive)

sample.description: Return N random items from the list

shuffle.description: Return a randomly shuffled copy of the list
